injuries.name: Jared Jones
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Spencer Horwitz
injuries.detail: Pirates general manager Ben Cherington said Sunday that Horwitz (hamstring) will remain sidelined for "weeks, not days," and the first baseman isn't expected to return from the 10-day injured list until after the All-Star break, Colin Beazley of the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette reports.

injuries.name: Oneil Cruz
injuries.detail: Pirates general manager Ben Cherington said Sunday that he expects Cruz (hand) to return from the 10-day injured list at some point in July, most likely after the All-Star break, Colin Beazley of the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette reports.

injuries.name: Wilber Dotel
injuries.detail: Dotel (lat) will begin a rehab assignment at Double-A Altoona on Saturday, Kevin Gorman of TribLive.com reports.

injuries.name: Anthony Solometo
injuries.detail: Solometo underwent left shoulder labrum surgery and is expected to be sidelined until at least April 2027, Mark Chiarelli of Baseball America reports.

injuries.name: Chris Devenski
injuries.detail: Devenski (illness) was transferred from the 15-day IL to the 60-day IL on Sunday.

injuries.name: Sean Sullivan
injuries.detail: Pirates director of sports medicine Todd Tomczyk said Wednesday that Sullivan is battling right elbow soreness, Andrew Destin of the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette reports.

injuries.name: Brad Keller
injuries.detail: Phillies interim manager Don Mattingly said Wednesday that Keller (forearm) is expected to return before the All-Star break, Matt Gelb of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Johan Rojas
injuries.detail: Rojas (suspension) underwent surgery Friday to repair the UCL in his right elbow and will face an expected recovery timeline of 6-to-8 months, Scott Lauber of The Philadelphia Inquirer reports.

injuries.name: Adolis Garcia
injuries.detail: The Phillies announced that Garcia underwent successful surgery Wednesday to repair a torn right lat, Lochlahn March of The Philadelphia Inquirer reports.

injuries.name: Liover Peguero
injuries.detail: The Phillies reassigned Peguero to minor-league camp Sunday.

injuries.name: Daniel Robert
injuries.detail: Robert suffered a cardiac incident Sunday while preparing to throw a bullpen session and was taken to a local hospital, Matt Gelb of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Mark Kolozsvary
injuries.detail: Kolozsvary (undisclosed) agreed to a minor-league contract with the Phillies on Friday that includes an invitation to spring training, Will Sammon of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Graham Ashcraft
injuries.detail: Ashcraft is expected to resume throwing soon after receiving good news Tuesday regarding the imaging on his injured right elbow UCL, Charlie Goldsmith of Fox 19 Now Cincinnati reports.

injuries.name: Hunter Greene
injuries.detail: Greene (elbow) will make his season debut for the Reds on Saturday versus the Orioles, Charlie Goldsmith of Fox 19 Now Cincinnati reports.

injuries.name: Dane Myers
injuries.detail: The Reds placed Myers on the 10-day injured list Tuesday with a left shoulder contusion, Charlie Goldsmith of Fox 19 Now Cincinnati reports.

injuries.name: Ke'Bryan Hayes
injuries.detail: Manager Terry Francona said that Hayes (back) will face live pitching at the Reds' facility in Arizona on Wednesday or Thursday, Charlie Goldsmith of Fox 19 Now Cincinnati reports.

injuries.name: Brandon Williamson
injuries.detail: Williamson (shoulder) injured his finger while working out, and his rehab program has been pushed back by about 10 days as a result, Charlie Goldsmith of Fox 19 Now Cincinnati reports.

injuries.name: Blake Dunn
injuries.detail: Dunn (elbow) underwent an MRI on Saturday and is likely to return to Cincinnati for more testing, Mark Sheldon of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Tony Santillan
injuries.detail: Reds manager Terry Francona said Friday that an MRI on Santillan's left oblique showed a significant strain, Charlie Goldsmith of Fox 19 Now Cincinnati reports.

injuries.name: Connor Burns
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Carson Spiers
injuries.detail: The Reds re-signed Spiers (elbow) to a minor-league contract with an invitation to spring training Monday.

injuries.name: Carlos Rodriguez
injuries.detail: Rodriguez (shoulder) struck out a batter and allowed three earned runs on two hits and one walk across 1.1 innings Wednesday in a rehab start for the Brewers' rookie-level Arizona Complex League affiiate.

injuries.name: Logan Henderson
injuries.detail: Henderson (back) will make his next minor-league rehab start Friday, Jack Stern of BrewerFanatic.com reports.

injuries.name: Rob Zastryzny
injuries.detail: Zastryzny (shoulder) will throw a live batting practice session Tuesday, Jack Stern of BrewerFanatic.com reports.

injuries.name: DL Hall
injuries.detail: Hall (pectoral) has progressed to throwing on flat ground from 60-to-75 feet, Jack Stern of BrewerFanatic.com reports.

injuries.name: Coleman Crow
injuries.detail: Crow (forearm) will throw a live batting practice session Tuesday, Jack Stern of BrewerFanatic.com reports.

injuries.name: Brandon Lockridge
injuries.detail: Lockridge's timeline for a return has been pushed back to late July after imaging showed a chondral flap in his right patella, Curt Hogg of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.

injuries.name: Quinn Priester
injuries.detail: Priester will undergo thoracic outlet compression surgery on Monday and is expected to be sidelined 8-to-10 months, Curt Hogg of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.

injuries.name: Brian Fitzpatrick
injuries.detail: Fitzpatrick (elbow) has been diagnosed with a left UCL strain and will get a second opinion to determine if he needs Tommy John surgery, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Angel Zerpa
injuries.detail: The Brewers transferred Zerpa (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Sunday.

injuries.name: Anthony Bender
injuries.detail: The Marlins placed Bender on the 15-day injured list Tuesday with a right shin stress reaction.

injuries.name: Janson Junk
injuries.detail: Junk (shin) allowed one run over 2.2 innings in his first rehab start with Triple-A Jacksonville on Sunday before exiting after being struck on the left wrist by a comebacker, Christina De Nicola of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Josh Ekness
injuries.detail: Marlins manager Clayton McCullough said Monday that Ekness is expected to miss approximately six weeks due to a right calf strain, Kyle Sielaff of Marlins.tv reports.

injuries.name: Thomas White
injuries.detail: White was diagnosed with a left shoulder capsular sprain Friday and is expected to miss the rest of the season, Isaac Azout of FishOnFirst.com reports.

injuries.name: Andrew Nardi
injuries.detail: The Marlins transferred Nardi (ribcage) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Monday.

injuries.name: Robby Snelling
injuries.detail: Snelling underwent internal brace surgery Friday to repair a torn UCL in his left elbow.

injuries.name: Ronny Henriquez
injuries.detail: The Marlins placed Henriquez (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Thursday.

injuries.name: Jesus Tinoco
injuries.detail: The Marlins re-signed Tinoco (elbow) to a minor-league contract Jan. 5.

injuries.name: Adam Mazur
injuries.detail: The Marlins placed Mazur (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Wednesday.

injuries.name: Jaden Hill
injuries.detail: Hill (shoulder) resumed playing catch Wednesday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Brenton Doyle
injuries.detail: Doyle (oblique) was scratched from a rehab appearance with Triple-A Albuquerque on Tuesday due to groin tightness, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Tomoyuki Sugano
injuries.detail: Sugano did not factor into the decision Friday, allowing seven runs on eight hits and one walk over five innings against the Twins. He struck out two.

injuries.name: Chase Dollander
injuries.detail: Dollander underwent an internal brace procedure on his right elbow Monday, Kevin Henry of The Denver Gazette reports.

injuries.name: Blas Castano
injuries.detail: Castano was called up from Triple-A Albuquerque on Thursday.

injuries.name: Welinton Herrera
injuries.detail: Rockies manager Warren Schaeffer announced Monday that Herrera (elbow) has been diagnosed with a torn UCL and will miss the remainder of the season, Jack Janes of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: McCade Brown
injuries.detail: Brown (shoulder) had been scheduled to throw a live bullpen session this weekend, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jose Quintana
injuries.detail: The Rockies placed Quintana on the 15-day injured list Monday with a left elbow sprain.

injuries.name: RJ Petit
injuries.detail: The Rockies transferred Petit (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Thursday, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Brayan Castillo
injuries.detail: The Rockies announced Monday that Castillo is dealing with right lat tightness and has been shut down from throwing while undergoing treatment for the injury, TheDNVR.com reports.

injuries.name: Pierson Ohl
injuries.detail: The Rockies placed Ohl (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Wednesday.

injuries.name: Kris Bryant
injuries.detail: Bryant said Tuesday that the ongoing pain in his back continues to prevent him from participating in baseball activities, though he's still consulting with doctors and trainers for potential rehab options, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Case Williams
injuries.detail: Williams is currently slowed by a stress reaction in his right triceps, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jared Thomas
injuries.detail: The Rockies announced Monday that Thomas hasn't been participating in spring training while he recovers from offseason surgery to address a fractured hamate bone in his right wrist, TheDNVR.com reports.

injuries.name: Munetaka Murakami
injuries.detail: Manager Will Venable said Monday that Murakami (hamstring) traveled with the team for its road trip and is considered day-to-day, but the White Sox haven't yet established a timeline for the first baseman to begin a rehab assignment, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Everson Pereira
injuries.detail: Pereira (concussion) is making progress in his recovery but is still experiencing concussion symptoms, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Hagen Smith
injuries.detail: Smith will be shut down for two weeks after being diagnosed with a left shoulder impingement, James Fegan of SoxMachine.com reports.

injuries.name: Tim Elko
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Tyler Gilbert
injuries.detail: The White Sox placed Gilbert on the 15-day injured list Wednesday with a left shoulder impingement.

injuries.name: Austin Hays
injuries.detail: Hays has been pulled off his rehab assignment at Triple-A Charlotte due to a recurrence of left calf soreness, Scott Merkin of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jordan Leasure
injuries.detail: Leasure (forearm) said Friday that he will be shut down from throwing for four weeks, James Fegan of SoxMachine.com reports.

injuries.name: Ky Bush
injuries.detail: Bush (elbow) had a setback in his recovery from Tommy John surgery and is unlikely to return until the second half of the season, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Drew Thorpe
injuries.detail: Thorpe (elbow) recently underwent an appendectomy but has resumed throwing, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Prelander Berroa
injuries.detail: Berroa is dealing with right elbow inflammation and will have his rehab stint paused, James Fegan of SoxMachine.com reports.

injuries.name: Mike Vasil
injuries.detail: The White Sox transferred Vasil (elbow) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Tuesday.

injuries.name: Tanner Murray
injuries.detail: The White Sox transferred Murray (shoulder) to the 60-day injured list Monday.

injuries.name: Mason Adams
injuries.detail: The White Sox announced that Adams underwent successful Tommy John surgery Wednesday, Scott Merkin of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Brooks Baldwin
injuries.detail: The White Sox transferred Baldwin (elbow) from the 10-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Wednesday.

injuries.name: Jose Ramirez
injuries.detail: Ramirez had stitches removed from his left hand Tuesday and could soon begin swinging a bat as the next step in his rehab process, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Angel Martinez
injuries.detail: Martinez (foot) has shed his walking boot, is playing catch and hitting off a batting tee, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Tanner Burns
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Carlos Hernandez
injuries.detail: Hernandez (shoulder) began his rehab assignment with Triple-A Omaha on Friday.

injuries.name: Ryne Stanek
injuries.detail: The Cardinals placed Stanek on the paternity leave list Tuesday, Derrick Goold of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.

injuries.name: Skylar Hales
injuries.detail: Hales was traded from the Rangers to the Cardinals on Thursday along with Mason Molina and international bonus pool money in exchange for Phil Maton, Katie Woo of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Chase Davis
injuries.detail: Davis swatted a pair of home runs Monday in Grapefruit League action versus the Orioles.

injuries.name: Zack Thompson
injuries.detail: Thompson (shoulder) has been shut down due to an intercostal strain, Amber Winkler of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.

injuries.name: Sem Robberse
injuries.detail: Robberse (elbow) has been sent to the Cardinals' Florida Complex League affiliate to begin a rehab assignment.

injuries.name: Ramon Urias
injuries.detail: Urias (elbow) returned to St. Louis to undergo an examination on his left elbow, Jeff Jones of the Belleville News-Democrat reports.

injuries.name: Packy Naughton
injuries.detail: Naughton will undergo surgery next month to repair the damaged UCL in his left elbow, Derrick Goold of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.

injuries.name: Ixan Henderson
injuries.detail: Henderson (elbow) is starting the season on the 60-day injured list at Triple-A Memphis.

injuries.name: AJ Smith-Shawver
injuries.detail: Smith-Shawver (elbow) pitched three innings Tuesday during a rehab start with Single-A Augusta, allowing one run on three hits while striking out four batters, Chad Bishop of The Atlanta Journal-Constitution reports.

injuries.name: Ronald Acuna Jr.
injuries.detail: Acuna (hamstring) went through a full pregame workout at Truist Park in Atlanta on Tuesday, Chad Bishop of The Atlanta Journal-Constitution reports.

injuries.name: Spencer Schwellenbach
injuries.detail: Schwellenbach (elbow) will likely report to Atlanta's spring training facility in early July and could be a candidate to rejoin the major-league rotation by late August or early September, Mark Bowman of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Robert Suarez
injuries.detail: An MRI on Suarez's right elbow came back negative Friday, Mark Bowman of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Danny Young
injuries.detail: Young (elbow) walked and hit a batter but struck out three in a scoreless inning in his first rehab appearance with Double-A Columbus on Tuesday.

injuries.name: Kyle Farmer
injuries.detail: Farmer (forearm) will begin a rehab assignment with Double-A Columbus on Tuesday.

injuries.name: Spencer Strider
injuries.detail: Atlanta  transferred Strider (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Wednesday.

injuries.name: Sean Murphy
injuries.detail: Murphy had the cast on his left hand removed Tuesday and is now wearing a splint to protect his fractured middle finger, Grant McAuley of the Marietta Daily Journal reprots.

injuries.name: Joe Jimenez
injuries.detail: Atlanta manager Walt Weiss revealed Wednesday that Jimenez underwent another surgery on his left knee 3-to-4 weeks ago, Grant McAuley of the Marietta Daily Journal reports.

injuries.name: Jurickson Profar
injuries.detail: Profar will miss the full 2026 season after the appeal of his 162-game PED suspension was denied Thursday, Jeff Passan of ESPN.com reports.

injuries.name: Joey Wentz
injuries.detail: Atlanta placed Wentz (knee) on the 60-day injured list Tuesday.

injuries.name: Austin Vernon
injuries.detail: Triple-A Durham placed Vernon (elbow) on its full-season injured list Friday.

injuries.name: Jake Fraley
injuries.detail: Fraley (hernia) began a rehab assignment with the rookie-level Florida Complex League on Saturday, going 0-for-3 as the designated hitter.

injuries.name: Luis Guerrero
injuries.detail: The Rays acquired Guerrero from the Red Sox on Tuesday in exchange for Tristan Gray.

injuries.name: Tre' Morgan
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Logan Davidson
injuries.detail: Davidson signed a minor-league contract with Tampa Bay on Monday, which includes an invitation to spring training, Ari Alexander of KPRC 2 Houston reports.

injuries.name: Steven Matz
injuries.detail: The Rays placed Matz on the 15-day injured list Thursday with a left ankle sprain.

injuries.name: Edwin Uceta
injuries.detail: Manager Kevin Cash said Friday that Uceta (shoulder) will resume his throwing program sometime around June 29, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.

injuries.name: Manuel Rodriguez
injuries.detail: Manager Kevin Cash said Friday that Rodriguez (elbow) will begin throwing live batting practice June 30, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.

injuries.name: Gavin Lux
injuries.detail: Lux (shoulder) is scheduled to begin a rehab assignment June 29, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.

injuries.name: Jonathan Heasley
injuries.detail: Heasley was returned to the major-league roster and placed on the 15-day injured list Tuesday with a right elbow stress reaction.

injuries.name: Steven Wilson
injuries.detail: The Rays hope Wilson (back) will be able to start bullpen sessions June 8, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jesse Scholtens
injuries.detail: Scholtens was charged with a blown save and dropped to 5-3 on the season in Monday's 9-7 loss to the Orioles in 13 innings after yielding five runs (three earned) on four hits across 1.1 frames. He struck out one batter.

injuries.name: Ryan Pepiot
injuries.detail: Pepiot will undergo surgery on his right hip May 13 and miss the rest of the 2026 season, Ryan Bass of Rays.tv reports.

injuries.name: Alfredo Zarraga
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Carlos Estevez
injuries.detail: Estevez (shoulder) received an injection Wednesday and will be shut down for the rest of the week before being re-evaluated, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Stephen Kolek
injuries.detail: Kolek (personal) is expected to return from the family medical emergency list to start Thursday's game against Tampa Bay, Anne Rogers of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Connor Seabold
injuries.detail: The Royals placed Seabold on the 15-day injured list Wednesday with a right lat strain.

injuries.name: Kris Bubic
injuries.detail: Royals senior vice president Scott Sharp said Wednesday on Sports Radio 810 WHB that Bubic (elbow/shoulder) has been scratched from his next scheduled rehab start and will return to Kansas City for further evaluation.

injuries.name: Kyle Isbel
injuries.detail: Isbel (foot) will continue his rehab in Arizona to begin July with the hope of embarking on a rehab assignment before the All-Star break, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Vinnie Pasquantino
injuries.detail: Pasquantino (hand) will continue his rehab in Arizona to begin July with the hope of embarking on a rehab assignment before the All-Star break, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Nick Mears
injuries.detail: Mears (shoulder) threw a bullpen Saturday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Cole Ragans
injuries.detail: Ragans will undergo surgery on his left elbow Wednesday, Anne Rogers of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Maikel Garcia
injuries.detail: The Royals placed Garcia on the 10-day injured list Tuesday due to a left hand muscle strain.

injuries.name: Jonathan India
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: James McArthur
injuries.detail: McArthur (elbow) underwent surgery Friday to help combat continued soreness and inflammation, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Javier Vaz
injuries.detail: Vaz (fingers) has produced a .238/.304/.262 slash line with zero home runs and three stolen bases in 10 games since being activated from Double-A Northwest Arkansas' 7-day injured list April 22.

injuries.name: Tyson Guerrero
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Alec Marsh
injuries.detail: The Royals placed Marsh (shoulder) on the 60-day injured list Thursday.

injuries.name: Will Vest
injuries.detail: The Tigers placed Vest on the 15-day injured list Wednesday with posterior right elbow inflammation.

injuries.name: Jackson Jobe
injuries.detail: Jobe (elbow) will throw live batting practice Saturday, Chris McCosky of The Detroit News reports.

injuries.name: Wenceel Perez
injuries.detail: Tigers manager A.J. Hinch said Tuesday that Perez won't require surgery for the left orbital fracture he sustained June 16, but the outfielder lacks a clear timeline for a return, Evan Petzold of the Detroit Free Press reports. "It's not, from what I understand, where it's going to be something long term," Hinch said of Perez's injury. "But it doesn't mean it heals itself fast. He's feeling better and better and reporting progress."

injuries.name: Parker Meadows
injuries.detail: Tigers manager A.J. Hinch said Tuesday that Meadows (forearm) has yet to resume hitting and is without a timeline to return from the 60-day injured list, Evan Petzold of the Detroit Free Press reports.

injuries.name: Burch Smith
injuries.detail: The Tigers transferred Smith (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Tuesday.

injuries.name: Gleyber Torres
injuries.detail: Torres (oblique) received a cortisone injection Friday and is expected to start up his rehab program in the next day or two, Chris McCosky of The Detroit News reports.

injuries.name: Justin Verlander
injuries.detail: Verlander (hip) has been scratched from a scheduled start Sunday versus the White Sox due to a left hamstring injury, Cody Stavenhagen of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Javier Baez
injuries.detail: The Tigers transferred Baez (ankle) to the 60-day injured list Thursday, Cody Stavenhagen of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Trey Sweeney
injuries.detail: Sweeney will undergo season-ending shoulder surgery this week, Cody Stavenhagen of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Brant Hurter
injuries.detail: The Tigers placed Hurter on the 15-day injured list Sunday due to lumbar spine inflammation.

injuries.name: Bailey Horn
injuries.detail: Horn (elbow) began a throwing progression May 14, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Reese Olson
injuries.detail: The Tigers placed Olson on the 60-day injured list Tuesday after he underwent a right shoulder labral repair Feb. 2 that will result in him missing the 2026 season.

injuries.name: Josue Briceno
injuries.detail: Briceno said Friday that he expects to be sidelined a few months after having surgery Wednesday to repair a tendon in his right wrist, Evan Petzold of the Detroit Free Press reports.

injuries.name: Corey Seager
injuries.detail: The Rangers placed Seager on the 10-day injured list Wednesday due to lower-back inflammation.

injuries.name: Brandon Nimmo
injuries.detail: Nimmo (shoulder) is out of the lineup for Wednesday's game against the Guardians.

injuries.name: Jordan Montgomery
injuries.detail: Montgomery (elbow) struck out three over two perfect innings in a rehab start Saturday with Double-A Frisco.

injuries.name: Chris Martin
injuries.detail: Martin (shoulder) was sent to Double-A Frisco on Sunday to begin a rehab assignment.

injuries.name: Wyatt Langford
injuries.detail: Rangers manager Skip Schumaker said Sunday that Langford (hamstring) will remain on the 10-day injured list through the All-Star break, Kennedi Landry of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Cody Freeman
injuries.detail: The Rangers placed Freeman on the 10-day injured list Thursday due to a herniated disc.

injuries.name: Jack Leiter
injuries.detail: Leiter underwent arthroscopic surgery to remove a loose body from his right ankle region Tuesday and should be considered out indefinitely, Kennedi Landry of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Danny Jansen
injuries.detail: Jansen (forearm) was able to throw out to 60 feet Saturday, Shawn McFarland of The Dallas Morning News reports.

injuries.name: Michael Helman
injuries.detail: Texas transferred Helman (hand) to the 60-day injured list Friday.

injuries.name: Sebastian Walcott
injuries.detail: Walcott (elbow) will begin to ramp up his activity soon and is still on track for a late-July or early-August return to a minor-league affiliate, Kennedi Landry of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jalen Beeks
injuries.detail: Beeks (2-1) earned the win in relief Saturday against the Cubs after tossing 1.1 scoreless innings. He struck out one with no hits or walks allowed.

injuries.name: Robert Garcia
injuries.detail: The Rangers transferred Garcia (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Monday.

injuries.name: Carter Baumler
injuries.detail: Baumler (intercostal) has been shut down from his rehab assignment, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Cody Bradford
injuries.detail: Bradford (elbow) began throwing from 60 feet during the Rangers' most recent homestand, MLB.com reports

injuries.name: Declan Cronin
injuries.detail: Cronin (elbow) signed a two-year, minor-league contract with the Rangers on Tuesday, Bob Nightengale of USA Today reports.

injuries.name: Nabil Crismatt
injuries.detail: Crismatt will undergo surgery to repair a torn UCL in his right elbow, Evan Grant of The Dallas Morning News reports.

injuries.name: Travis d'Arnaud
injuries.detail: D'Arnaud (foot) was able to catch from a pitching machine Sunday and has continued to do swinging and throwing in his workouts, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Grayson Rodriguez
injuries.detail: Rodriguez (back) struck out four and allowed one earned run on five hits and one walk across four innings Sunday in his rehab start for Single-A Rancho Cucamonga.

injuries.name: Mike Trout
injuries.detail: Trout (hamstring) took 30 swings and ran at about 50 percent intensity Saturday, Jeff Fletcher of The Orange County Register reports.

injuries.name: Jack Kochanowicz
injuries.detail: Kochanowicz's Tommy John surgery on his right elbow was deemed "successful," per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Yusei Kikuchi
injuries.detail: Kikuchi (shoulder) has begun a throwing program, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Ben Joyce
injuries.detail: Joyce (shoulder) has been throwing at the Angels' complex in Arizona, but he's limited to fastball-only bullpens, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Adam Frazier
injuries.detail: Frazier (elbow) resumed throwing Wednesday, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Niko Kavadas
injuries.detail: The Angels reassigned Kavadas to minor-league camp Wednesday.

injuries.name: Sebastian Rivero
injuries.detail: Rivero was removed from Tuesday's game against the Astros with an apparent left hand injury, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Yoan Moncada
injuries.detail: Moncada will require surgery on his right knee, Francys Romero of BeisbolFR.com reports.

injuries.name: Gustavo Campero
injuries.detail: The Angels selected Campero's contract from Double-A Rocket City and placed him on the 10-day injured list Saturday due to a fractured hand.

injuries.name: Robert Stephenson
injuries.detail: The Angels announced that Stephenson underwent ligament and flexor repair surgery on his right elbow Wednesday and is likely to miss the remainder of the season, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Anthony Rendon
injuries.detail: The Angels placed Rendon (hip) on the 60-day injured list Tuesday.

injuries.name: Luke Raley
injuries.detail: Raley (forearm) is out of the lineup for Tuesday's game against the Angels.

injuries.name: Brendan Donovan
injuries.detail: Donovan (groin) ran sprints on the field Monday and will be re-evaluated after the Mariners' homestand to determine whether he's ready to begin a rehab assignment, Ryan Divish of The Seattle Times reports.

injuries.name: Rob Refsnyder
injuries.detail: The Mariners placed Refsnyder (knees) on the 10-day injured list Monday, Adam Jude of The Seattle Times reports.

injuries.name: Carlos Vargas
injuries.detail: Mariners general manager Justin Hollander said Tuesday that Vargas (lat) recently began a throwing program and could be ready to return from the 60-day injured list around the Aug. 3 trade deadline, Zac Hereth of 710 AM Seattle Sports reports.

injuries.name: Will Wilson
injuries.detail: Wilson (thumb) has gone 3-for-9 with two RBI and a 1:2 BB:K in his first three rehab games between High-A Everett and Triple-A Tacoma.

injuries.name: Cooper Criswell
injuries.detail: Criswell was diagnosed with a Grade 1-plus pectoral strain Tuesday, Daniel Kramer of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Matt Brash
injuries.detail: General manager Justin Hollander said Tuesday that Brash was diagnosed with a Grade 1 strain in his right lat, Shannon Drayer of SeattleSports.com reports.

injuries.name: Dane Dunning
injuries.detail: The Mariners signed Dunning to a minor-league contract Thursday, Chris Cotillo of MassLive.com reports.

injuries.name: Logan Evans
injuries.detail: The Mariners placed Evans (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Monday.

injuries.name: German Marquez
injuries.detail: Marquez (forearm) recorded two outs and allowed three earned runs on three hits and one walk during his rehab appearance Tuesday with Triple-A El Paso.

injuries.name: David Morgan
injuries.detail: The Padres recalled Morgan from Triple-A El Paso on Friday.

injuries.name: Luis Campusano
injuries.detail: Campusano (toe) will embark on a rehab assignment with Triple-A El Paso later this week, Annie Heilbrunn of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.

injuries.name: Nick Pivetta
injuries.detail: Pivetta (forearm) threw a light bullpen session Saturday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Matt Waldron
injuries.detail: Waldron (forearm) struck out four and allowed two earned runs on two hits and four walks across 2.2 innings Thursday in a rehab start with Triple-A El Paso.

injuries.name: Lucas Giolito
injuries.detail: Giolito was placed on the 15-day injured list Tuesday, retroactive to Monday, with right elbow inflammation.

injuries.name: Joe Musgrove
injuries.detail: Musgrove (elbow) started playing catch in late May, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Ramon Laureano
injuries.detail: Laureano underwent surgery Friday to repair his torn right labrum, Kevin Acee of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.

injuries.name: Jeremiah Estrada
injuries.detail: Estrada (2-2) picked up the loss after giving up the eventual game-winning run in a 3-2 loss to Philadelphia on Tuesday.

injuries.name: Yu Darvish
injuries.detail: Darvish (elbow) revealed Tuesday in a social media post that he has resumed playing catch.

injuries.name: Bryan Hoeing
injuries.detail: The Padres transferred Hoeing (elbow) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Wednesday.

injuries.name: Mookie Betts
injuries.detail: Betts went 3-for-5 with a double, one RBI and one run scored in Tuesday's 9-3 win over the Athletics.

injuries.name: Will Smith
injuries.detail: Manager Dave Roberts said Wednesday that Smith (neck) is expected to remain out until after the All-Star break, Bill Shaikin of the Los Angeles Times reports.

injuries.name: Tyler Glasnow
injuries.detail: Glasnow (back) has been cleared to begin a throwing program, Jack Harris of the California Post reports.

injuries.name: Blake Treinen
injuries.detail: Treinen does not have any structural damage in his injured right elbow, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Blake Snell
injuries.detail: Snell (elbow) threw a 15-pitch bullpen session Friday, and manager Dave Roberts said it went well, David Vassegh of AM 570 LA Sports reports.

injuries.name: Landon Knack
injuries.detail: Knack (chest) began a rehab assignment with Triple-A Oklahoma City on Thursday, yielding two runs on five hits and one walk over 1.1 innings.

injuries.name: Kendall George
injuries.detail: George (knee) has been rehabbing at the Dodgers' spring training facility in Arizona and is on track to return after the All-Star break, Bill Plunkett of The Orange County Register reports.

injuries.name: Edwin Diaz
injuries.detail: Diaz (elbow) is throwing in the bullpen Friday at Dodger Stadium, reports Jack Harris of the California Post.

injuries.name: Enrique Hernandez
injuries.detail: Hernandez (oblique) has started some baseball activities but remains in the early stages of his rehab, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Evan Phillips
injuries.detail: Phillips (elbow) began a rehab assignment with Triple-A Oklahoma City on Thursday, yielding one hit and one walk over two-thirds of a scoreless frame.

injuries.name: Bobby Miller
injuries.detail: Miller (shoulder/back) will resume throwing off the mound this week, Cody Snavely of DodgersBeat.com reports.

injuries.name: Gavin Stone
injuries.detail: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts revealed Tuesday that Stone has been unable to ramp up his throwing without feeling soreness in his surgically repaired right shoulder, Cody Snavely of DodgersBeat.com reports.

injuries.name: Brusdar Graterol
injuries.detail: Graterol (shoulder) underwent surgery recently for a back injury he suffered while on a rehab assignment, Jack Harris of the California Post reports.

injuries.name: Ben Casparius
injuries.detail: Casparius (shoulder) was moved to the 60-day injured list Monday.

injuries.name: Jake Cousins
injuries.detail: The Dodgers transferred Cousins (elbow) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Wednesday, Fabian Ardaya of The Athletic reports.
